meta.title: Characterization of IS900 loci in Mycobacterium avium subsp. paratuberculosis and development of multiplex PCR typing

abstractHtml: The text should read: ...The PCR mix consisted of a 50 µl reaction volume containing a final concentration of 2 pmol of each Loc primer µl-1, 10 pmol of each IS900 primer µl-1, 10% (v/v) DMSO, 1.5 mM MgCl2, 200 µM dNTP...
